case_title: NEAL H. KONAMI VS. RAYMIE STATA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL; FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONAMI, NEAL H.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-06-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-14-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,797.45 FILED BY KONAMI, NEAL H. AS TO DEFENDANT STATA, RAYMIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STATA, RAYMIE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY STATA, RAYMIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KONAMI, NEAL H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT STATA, RAYMIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KONAMI, NEAL H. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONAMI, NEAL H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATA, RAYMIE $5,797.45 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,952.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
